content.json:
# MCP Factory — Operational Metrics

Live view of the discovery, generation, and chat pipeline. All values are read from Application Insights custom events emitted by `api/main.py`.

| Event | Dimensions |
|---|---|
| `discovery_complete` | `job_id`, `file_count`, `invocable_count` |
| `generate_complete` | `job_id`, `tool_count`, `component` |
| `chat_complete` | `job_id`, `rounds`, `tool_calls_total`, `duration_ms` |

> All dimensions land in `customDimensions` as strings — use `toint()` / `todouble()` in KQL.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "discovery_complete"
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| count
content.title: Analyses this week

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "discovery_complete"
| extend invocable_count = toint(customDimensions["invocable_count"])
| summarize avg_invocables = round(avg(invocable_count), 1)
content.title: Avg invocables per job

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "chat_complete"
| extend tool_calls = toint(customDimensions["tool_calls_total"])
| summarize total = count(), with_tools = countif(tool_calls > 0)
| extend success_rate_pct = round(todouble(with_tools) * 100.0 / todouble(total), 1)
| project success_rate_pct
content.title: Tool call success rate %

content.query:
customEvents
| where name in ("discovery_complete", "generate_complete", "chat_complete")
| extend dur = toint(customDimensions["duration_ms"])
| where isnotnull(dur)
| summarize avg_ms = round(avg(dur), 0), p95_ms = round(percentile(dur, 95), 0), job_count = count() by operation = name
| order by avg_ms desc
content.title: Avg & P95 duration by operation (ms)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name in ("discovery_complete", "generate_complete", "chat_complete")
| summarize count() by name, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Event throughput over time
